scenarioName: Keep status truth separate from status projection

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Keep status truth separate from status projection
    Given a status sentinel exists
    When a product owner opens it
    Then the sentinel should clearly state that the sentinel is a projection, not the source of truth
    And it should include:
      | field |
      | feature id |
      | feature name |
      | display status |
      | implementation status |
      | execution proof status |
      | end-user QA status |
      | promotion status |
      | latest execution proof path |
      | latest QA bundle path |
      | latest promotion decision path |
      | blocker count |
      | blocker codes |
      | generated at |
      | generated by |
    And it should include a short product-owner summary
    And it should include the next recommended action
    And it should never require a reader to inspect JSON to understand the status.
acceptanceCriteria: Then the sentinel should clearly state that the sentinel is a projection, not the source of truth
And it should include a short product-owner summary
And it should include the next recommended action
And it should never require a reader to inspect JSON to understand the status.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
